sections.title: Introduction
body: PILOT MOBILITY PRIVATE LIMITED ("Pilot Mobility", "Pilot", "we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy.

This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, process, store, and protect your personal information when you use the Pilot - Learn Car Driving App, Pilot Instructor App, Admin Portal, and our website https://pilotnow.in (collectively referred to as the "Platform").

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
body: We may collect the following information:

sections.title: Personal Information
body: Name, mobile number, email address, date of birth, address, and profile photo.

sections.title: Verification Information (Instructors)
body: For instructors registering on the Platform, we may collect verification documents and details such as:
Aadhaar Card
PAN Card
Valid Driving License
Vehicle Registration Certificate (RC)
Vehicle Pollution Under Control (PUC) Certificate
Valid Vehicle Insurance
Other vehicle details used for training
Recent images of the training vehicle
Bank account details for instructor payouts
These documents are used for identity verification, instructor onboarding, and compliance purposes.

sections.title: Transaction Information
body: Package purchases, session logs, payments, and refunds.

sections.title: Location Data
body: The Platform may request access to your device location to help select pickup points and assist with session coordination between learners and instructors.
Location data is used only when required within the app for these purposes. Pilot does not perform background location tracking or continuous live location monitoring of users.

sections.title: Device Information
body: Device type, operating system, IP address, and app usage data.

sections.title: Payment Information
body: Payments are processed securely through Razorpay or other authorized payment partners.
Pilot does not store debit card, credit card, or UPI credentials.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
body: We use your information to:
Create and manage user accounts
Schedule and verify driving sessions (including OTP-based verification)
Assist with pickup point selection and coordination between learners and instructors
Coordinate RTO visits and provide license assistance services
Process payments and manage instructor payouts
Provide insurance coverage during active driving sessions
Improve platform performance, features, and safety
Comply with applicable legal, regulatory, and contractual requirements

sections.title: 3. Sharing of Information
body: We do not sell your personal information. Information may be shared with:
Assigned instructors or learners for session coordination
Razorpay and other payment partners for payment processing
Insurance partners for coverage and claims validation
Verification and KYC partners for identity and document verification
Government or regulatory authorities if required by law
All such third parties are required to maintain appropriate confidentiality and security standards when handling your information.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
body: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure cloud storage, role-based access control, and secure payment processing.
While we take reasonable precautions to protect your data, no system or method of transmission over the internet is completely secure.

sections.title: 5. Data Retention
body: We retain your information for as long as your account is active and as required to fulfil legal, regulatory, and business obligations.
After this period, we may delete or anonymize your data in accordance with applicable laws and our internal policies.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
body: You may request to access, update, or delete your personal information by contacting us.
Please note that certain information may be retained if required for legal, accounting, regulatory, or compliance purposes.

sections.title: 7. Children's Privacy
body: The Platform is intended only for individuals who are 18 years of age or older.
Both Learners and Instructors must be at least 18 years old to create an account and use the services offered on the Platform.
Pilot does not knowingly collect personal information from individuals under the age of 18.
If we become aware that a minor has provided personal information, we will take appropriate steps to delete such information and disable the associated account.

sections.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.
Any changes will be posted on our website and the updated effective date will be mentioned at the top of this page.
We encourage you to review this Policy periodically to stay informed about how we are protecting your information.

sections.title: 9. Contact Us
body: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:
Email: support@pilotnow.in
Website: https://pilotnow.in
